data.title: record-test-status.sh: WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR env var ignored for test-gate-status path
data.description: record-test-status.sh writes test-gate-status to a CWD-derived artifacts dir even when WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR is set. This causes harvest-worktree.sh to fail with test-gate-status not found in worktree isolation mode. The script should respect WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR like record-review.sh does with --findings-file. Workaround: use python to write the file directly. Impact: blocks per-worktree harvest without workaround.
